lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਏਕੁ ਵਿਖਾਲਿਆ ਮਨਿ ਤਨਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: satigur ek vikhaaliaa man tan sukh hoee |
lines.english: The True Guru has shown me the One Lord, and my mind and body are at peace.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੁਗ ਚਾਰੇ ਸਭ ਭਵਿ ਥਕੀ ਕਿਨਿ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਹੋਈ ॥
lines.translit: jug chaare sabh bhav thakee kin keemat hoee |
lines.english: All have grown weary of wandering throughout the four ages, but none know the Lord's worth.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਕਰਤਾ ਕਰੇ ਸੁ ਹੋਈ ॥੭॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa salaaheeai karataa kare su hoee |7|
lines.english: The Gurmukh praises the Lord forever; that alone happens, which the Creator Lord does. ||7||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨਾ ਭਉ ਤਿਨੑ ਨਾਹਿ ਭਉ ਮੁਚੁ ਭਉ ਨਿਭਵਿਆਹ ॥
lines.translit: jinaa bhau tina naeh bhau much bhau nibhaviaah |
lines.english: Those who have the Fear of God, have no other fears; those who do not have the Fear of God, are very afraid.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਹਲਾ ੨ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Salok, Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਰਦੇ ਕਉ ਤੁਰਦਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਉਡਤੇ ਕਉ ਉਡਤਾ ॥
lines.translit: turade kau turadaa milai uddate kau uddataa |
lines.english: That which flows, mingles with that which flows; that which blows, mingles with that which blows.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਏਹੁ ਪਟੰਤਰਾ ਤਿਤੁ ਦੀਬਾਣਿ ਗਇਆਹ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak ehu pattantaraa tith deebaan geaah |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, this mystery is revealed at the Court of the Lord. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 2 |
lines.english: Second Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਵਤੇ ਕਉ ਜੀਵਤਾ ਮਿਲੈ ਮੂਏ ਕਉ ਮੂਆ ॥
lines.translit: jeevate kau jeevataa milai mooe kau mooaa |
lines.english: The living mingle with the living, and the dead mingle with the dead.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਸੋ ਸਾਲਾਹੀਐ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਾਰਣੁ ਕੀਆ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak so saalaaheeai jin kaaran keea |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, praise the One who created the creation. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਚੁ ਧਿਆਇਨਿ ਸੇ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਰ ਸਬਦਿ ਵੀਚਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: sach dhiaaein se sache gur sabad veechaaree |
lines.english: Those who meditate on the True Lord are true; they contemplate the Word of the Guru's Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉਮੈ ਮਾਰਿ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲਾ ਹਰਿ ਨਾਮੁ ਉਰਿ ਧਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: haumai maar man niramalaa har naam ur dhaaree |
lines.english: They subdue their ego, purify their minds, and enshrine the Lord's Name within their hearts.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਠੇ ਮੰਡਪ ਮਾੜੀਆ ਲਗਿ ਪਏ ਗਾਵਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: kotthe manddap maarreea lag pe gaavaaree |
lines.english: The fools are attached to their homes, mansions and balconies.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਨੑਿ ਕੀਏ ਤਿਸਹਿ ਨ ਜਾਣਨੀ ਮਨਮੁਖਿ ਗੁਬਾਰੀ ॥
lines.translit: jina kee tiseh na jaananee manamukh gubaaree |
lines.english: The self-willed manmukhs are caught in darkness; they do not know the One who created them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਬੁਝਾਇਹਿ ਸੋ ਬੁਝਸੀ ਸਚਿਆ ਕਿਆ ਜੰਤ ਵਿਚਾਰੀ ॥੮॥
lines.translit: jis bujhaaeihi so bujhasee sachiaa kiaa jant vichaaree |8|
lines.english: He alone understands, whom the True Lord causes to understand; what can the helpless creatures do? ||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਤਉ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਕਰਿ ਜਾ ਪਹਿਲਾਂ ਕੰਤੁ ਮਨਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman tau seegaar kar jaa pahilaan kant manaae |
lines.english: O bride, decorate yourself, after you surrender and accept your Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੩ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Salok, Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮਣਿ ਪਿਰ ਮਨੁ ਮਾਨਿਆ ਤਉ ਬਣਿਆ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaaman pir man maaniaa tau baniaa seegaar |
lines.english: O bride, your decorations will adorn you, only when your Husband Lord's Mind is pleased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਤੁ ਸੇਜੈ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਆਵਈ ਏਵੈ ਬਿਰਥਾ ਜਾਇ ॥
lines.translit: mat sejai kant na aavee evai birathaa jaae |
lines.english: Otherwise, your Husband Lord will not come to your bed, and your ornaments will be useless.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ਤਬੋਲ ਰਸੁ ਭੋਜਨੁ ਭਾਉ ਕਰੇਇ ॥
lines.translit: bhau seegaar tabol ras bhojan bhaau karee |
lines.english: So make the Fear of God your ornaments, joy your betel nuts to chew, and love your food.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੀਆ ਤਉ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਾ ਸਹੁ ਧਰੇ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: keea tau paravaan hai jaa sahu dhare piaar |
lines.english: Your ornaments will be acceptable and approved, only when your Husband Lord loves you.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਜਲ ਫੂਲ ਤੰਬੋਲ ਰਸੁ ਲੇ ਧਨ ਕੀਆ ਸੀਗਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: kaajal fool tanbol ras le dhan keea seegaar |
lines.english: The wife takes flowers, and fragrance of betel, and decorates herself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਸਉਪੇ ਕੰਤ ਕਉ ਤਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਭੋਗੁ ਕਰੇਇ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: tan man saupe kant kau tau naanak bhog karee |1|
lines.english: Surrender your body and mind to your Husband Lord, and then, O Nanak, He will enjoy you. ||1||

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਜੈ ਕੰਤੁ ਨ ਆਇਓ ਏਵੈ ਭਇਆ ਵਿਕਾਰੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: sejai kant na aaeo evai bheaa vikaar |2|
lines.english: But her Husband Lord does not come to her bed, and so these efforts are useless. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਧਨ ਪਿਰੁ ਏਹਿ ਨ ਆਖੀਅਨਿ ਬਹਨਿ ਇਕਠੇ ਹੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: dhan pir ehi na aakheean behan ikatthe hoe |
lines.english: They are not said to be husband and wife, who merely sit together.

lines.translit: mahalaa 3 |
lines.english: Third Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕ ਜੋਤਿ ਦੁਇ ਮੂਰਤੀ ਧਨ ਪਿਰੁ ਕਹੀਐ ਸੋਇ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ek jot due mooratee dhan pir kaheeai soe |3|
lines.english: They alone are called husband and wife, who have one light in two bodies. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਭੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਭਗਤਿ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਨਾਮਿ ਨ ਲਗੈ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: bhai bin bhagat na hovee naam na lagai piaar |
lines.english: Without the Fear of God, there is no devotional worship, and no love for the Naam, the Name of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿਗੁਰਿ ਮਿਲਿਐ ਭਉ ਊਪਜੈ ਭੈ ਭਾਇ ਰੰਗੁ ਸਵਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: satigur miliai bhau aoopajai bhai bhaae rang savaar |
lines.english: Meeting with the True Guru, the Fear of God wells up, and one is embellished with the Fear and the Love of God.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨੁ ਤਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ਅਤਿ ਸੋਹਣਾ ਭੇਟਿਆ ਕ੍ਰਿਸਨ ਮੁਰਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: man tan niramal at sohanaa bhettiaa krisan muraar |
lines.english: The mind and body become immaculately pure and very beautiful, when one meets the Lord, the Destroyer of ego.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਨੁ ਮਨੁ ਰਤਾ ਰੰਗ ਸਿਉ ਹਉਮੈ ਤ੍ਰਿਸਨਾ ਮਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: tan man rataa rang siau haumai trisanaa maar |
lines.english: When the body and mind are imbued with the Lord's Love, egotism and desire are conquered and subdued.

lines.gurmukhi: ਵਾਹੁ ਖਸਮ ਤੂ ਵਾਹੁ ਜਿਨਿ ਰਚਿ ਰਚਨਾ ਹਮ ਕੀਏ ॥
lines.translit: vaahu khasam too vaahu jin rach rachanaa ham kee |
lines.english: Waaho! Waaho! You are wonderful and great, O Lord and Master; You created the creation, and made us.

lines.gurmukhi: ਭਉ ਭਾਉ ਸਭੁ ਤਿਸ ਦਾ ਸੋ ਸਚੁ ਵਰਤੈ ਸੰਸਾਰਿ ॥੯॥
lines.translit: bhau bhaau sabh tis daa so sach varatai sansaar |9|
lines.english: Fear and love all belong to Him; He is the True Lord, permeating and pervading the Universe. ||9||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਲੋਕ ਮਃ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: salok mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: Salok, First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਗਰ ਲਹਰਿ ਸਮੁੰਦ ਸਰ ਵੇਲਿ ਵਰਸ ਵਰਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: saagar lehar samund sar vel varas varaahu |
lines.english: You made the waters, waves, oceans, pools, plants, clouds and mountains.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪਿ ਖੜੋਵਹਿ ਆਪਿ ਕਰਿ ਆਪੀਣੈ ਆਪਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: aap kharroveh aap kar aapeenai aapaahu |
lines.english: You Yourself stand in the midst of what You Yourself created.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸੇਵਾ ਥਾਇ ਪਵੈ ਉਨਮਨਿ ਤਤੁ ਕਮਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sevaa thaae pavai unaman tat kamaahu |
lines.english: The selfless service of the Gurmukhs is approved; in celestial peace, they live the essence of reality.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਸਕਤਿ ਲਹਹੁ ਮਜੂਰੀਆ ਮੰਗਿ ਮੰਗਿ ਖਸਮ ਦਰਾਹੁ ॥
lines.translit: masakat lahahu majooreea mang mang khasam daraahu |
lines.english: They receive the wages of their labor, begging at the Door of their Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਪੁਰ ਦਰ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹ ਤਉ ਦਰਿ ਊਣਾ ਨਾਹਿ ਕੋ ਸਚਾ ਵੇਪਰਵਾਹੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: naanak pur dar veparavaah tau dar aoonaa naeh ko sachaa veparavaahu |1|
lines.english: O Nanak, the Court of the Lord is overflowing and carefree; O my True Carefree Lord, no one returns empty-handed from Your Court. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਲਾ ੧ ॥
lines.translit: mahalaa 1 |
lines.english: First Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਨ ਜਰੁ ਵੈਰੀ ਨਾਨਕਾ ਜਿ ਬੁਢੇ ਥੀਇ ਮਰੰਨਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tin jar vairee naanakaa ji budte thee maran |2|
lines.english: Old age is their enemy, O Nanak; when they grow old, they waste away. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਜਲ ਮੋਤੀ ਸੋਹਣੇ ਰਤਨਾ ਨਾਲਿ ਜੁੜੰਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: aujal motee sohane ratanaa naal jurran |
lines.english: The teeth are like brilliant, beautiful pearls, and the eyes are like sparkling jewels.
